info.name: LMS - Homework
info.description: Student homework endpoints — list, view, submit, delete submission

query.description: pending | submitted | graded — omit for all

request.description:
Returns all homework assigned to the student with stats summary.

**Filters:**
- `pending` — not submitted yet
- `submitted` — submitted but not graded
- `graded` — has a grade
- *(omit)* — return all

response.name: 200 OK — All
response.body:

request.description: Returns a single homework item with full details and the student's submission (if any).

response.name: 200 OK — With Submission

formdata.value: هذا هو الواجب المكتمل — تم حل جميع التمارين في الفصل الثاني.
formdata.description: Text answer (optional if file or file_url provided)
Link to already-uploaded file e.g. https://alertiqa.edu.sa/storage/... (optional)

request.description:
Submit or re-submit homework. At least one of `content`, `file`, or `file_url` is required.

Calling again **overwrites** the previous submission (updateOrCreate).

response.name: 201 Created
422 Nothing Provided

request.description: Submit homework with a file upload.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Submit homework by providing a URL to an already-uploaded file (no upload needed).

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Delete the student's own submission. Also deletes the uploaded file from storage if present.
